calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-21-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES IN THIS MATTER.

RULING: DEFENDANT THERESA MATACIA'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions. The motion is off calendar. A dismissal of the entire action with prejudice was filed on October 5, 2016.

Judge Pro Tem: Brad Kaplan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (JPT/302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. VADIM A. NEBUCHIN OF PHILIP ANDERSEN AND ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 1-925-225-6838 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THERESA MATACIA's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions - Defendant's Motion to Compel Plaintiff Eric Parton's responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Request for Production of Documents, Set One, and for sanctions against Plaintiff Eric Parton in the amount of $300, is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported.

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Set For Trial On Nov-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Assigned To Arbitration On May-09-16
